label: Ritual position (duelist start)
description: Places the pawn at one of the two duelist starting positions offset from the ritual target.

distFromTarget.label: Distance from target
distFromTarget.description: Cell distance from the ritual target at which to place the duelist.

duelistIndex.label: Duelist index
duelistIndex.description: 0 or 1 -- selects which of the two duelist start positions to use.
